summary: Murder case — the most violent khipu in the corpus. Death encoded as 3-element periphrasis: tana(support) + mana(no more) + llapa(divine lightning). Opens with S0 S0 (explicit double-zero = dead). Uncle (kaka x3) killed the mother (mama) with a weapon (maka x3). 9 guilty votes. Compensation 682 to the father.
